## ExternalObject interface

Object form of an external mapping.

Use this instead of the plain global-name form when the external library is mounted asynchronously (as a Promise) by the consuming application, i.e. the matching `pluginExternalBundle` external is configured with `async: true`<!-- -->.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export interface ExternalObject 
```

[async?](./lynx-bundle-rslib-config.externalobject.async.md)


</td><td>


</td><td>

boolean


</td><td>

_(Optional)_ Whether the library is mounted as a Promise resolving to the library namespace. When enabled, the external is emitted as a `promise` external so importing modules await the mounted value instead of reading it synchronously.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[libraryName](./lynx-bundle-rslib-config.externalobject.libraryname.md)


</td><td>


</td><td>

string \| string\[\]


</td><td>

The global name (with optional subpath) of the external library.


</td></tr>
